title: trifolium olivaceum
intro: Trifolium olivaceum, also known as olive clover, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its trifoliate leaves and pink or white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of olive clover include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as support for digestive health and skin problems. Olive clover is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
